Registry / Terms / correction device

correction device

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01019 · 14 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 13 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102007OIML R 117-1:2007
#01550
T.c.5
device connected to or incorporated in the meter for automatically correcting the measured quantity at the time of measurement, by taking into account the flowrate and/or the characteristics of the liquid to be measured (viscosity, temperature, pressure, etc.) and the pre-established calibration curves. The characteristics of the liquid shall either be measured using associated measuring devices, or stored in the memory of the instrument
pending
20102007OIML R 139:2007
#02000
T.1.12
device connected to or incorporated in the meter for automatically correcting the mass, by taking into account the flowrate and/or the characteristics of the gas to be measured (viscosity, temperature, pressure, etc.) and the pre-established calibration curves
pending
20102007OIML R 140:2007
#02052
T.1.11.2
device connected to or incorporated in the meter/and or a calculator for automatically correcting the volume at metering conditions, by taking into account the flowrate and/or the characteristics of the gas to be measured (temperature, pressure, gas composition, etc.) and by also taking into account pre- established calibration curves
pending
20102006OIML R 49-1:2006
#00417
2.1.7
device connected to or incorporated in the meter for automatically correcting the volume at metering conditions, by taking into account the flowrate and/or the characteristics of the water to be measured (e.g. temperature and pressure) and the pre-established calibration curves. The characteristics of the water to be measured may either be measured using associated measuring instruments, or be stored in a memory in the instrument
pending
20102006OIML R 137-1:2006
#01932
2.1.9
e. device intended for correction of known errors as a function of g. flowrate, Reynolds number (curve linearization), or pressure and/or temperature
pending
20102004OIML R 61-1:2004
#00770
T.2.1.4.4
device which automatically corrects the setting of the filling instrument
pending
20101998OIML R 81:1998
#01019
3.10
a device connected to or incorporated in the meter for automatically correcting the volume in metering conditions, by taking account of the flowrate and/or the characteristics of the liquid to be measured (viscosity, temperature, pressure, etc.) and pre-established calibration curves. The characteristics of the liquid may either be measured using associated measuring instruments, or stored in a memory within the instrument
pending
202X2024OIML R049-1:2024
#02346-R049-1
3.1.7
device connected to or incorporated in the meter for automatic correction of the volume of water at metering conditions (3.2.11), by taking into account the flow rate (3.3.1) and/or the characteristics of the water to be measured and the pre-established calibration curves
pending
202X2022OIML R139-1:2022
#02961
3.2.14
device connected to or incorporated in the meter for automatically correcting the mass, by taking into account the flow rate and/or the characteristics of the gas to be measured (viscosity, temperature, pressure, etc.) and the pre-established calibration curves
pending
202X2019OIML R117-1:2019
#02959
T.c.6
device connected to or incorporated in the meter for automatically correcting the measured quantity at the time of measurement, by taking into account the flowrate and/or the characteristics of the liquid to be measured (viscosity, temperature, pressure, etc.) and the pre-established calibration curves.
pending
202X2017OIML R061-1:2017
#02960
3.3.1.3.4
device which automatically corrects the setting of the AGFI
pending
202X2012OIML R137:2012
#02652
3.1.7
device intended for correction of known errors as a function of e.g. flow rate, Reynolds number (curve linearization), or density, pressure and/or temperature
pending
202X2007OIML R 140:2007
#02052
T.1.11.2
device connected to or incorporated in the meter/and or a calculator for automatically correcting the volume at metering conditions, by taking into account the flowrate and/or the characteristics of the gas to be measured (temperature, pressure, gas composition, etc.) and by also taking into account pre-established calibration curves
pending
202X1998OIML R 81:1998
#01019
3.10
a device connected to or incorporated in the meter for automatically correcting the volume in metering conditions, by taking account of the flowrate and/or the characteristics of the liquid to be measured (viscosity, temperature, pressure, etc.) and pre-established calibration curves. The characteristics of the liquid may either be measured using associated measuring instruments, or stored in a memory within the instrument
pending
